race_meta.race_name: BAR 1 Betting 'Download Our App For Cheltenham Rewards' Beginners Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed spread boss ted at position 2 (18.0% probability) vs top pick Ballygunner Castle (58.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~40.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Ballygunner Castle > Spread Boss Ted, but actual result was Spread Boss Ted > Ballygunner Castle. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Spread Boss Ted had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -0.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
